description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The front facade features large vertical windows and a driveway leading to a garage, with a spacious green lawn and a paved walkway. The rear of the house opens to a patio area with outdoor seating and a rectangular swimming pool, enclosed by a glass railing. The exterior walls are primarily white with some black accent panels, and the windows are arranged in vertical strips for a contemporary look. The interior layout includes multiple rooms, visible through the open roof, with wood and tile flooring. Several cars are parked along the side, and the property is bordered by grass and pavement, suggesting an urban or suburban neighborhood setting.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large vertical windows, a front driveway, and a backyard patio with a pool. The exterior is white with black accents and features a clean, geometric design.
description_view_0: The back and side of the house are visible, showing the patio area, pool, and several interior rooms with wood flooring.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the garage, parked cars, and the green lawn extending along the property.
description_view_2: The front of the house is shown, featuring the main entryway, large vertical windows, driveway, and a wide green lawn.
description_view_3: The rear and opposite side of the house are visible, focusing on the outdoor seating area, pool, and glass railing.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wide glass door, steps, and a paved walkway leading from the driveway, flanked by large vertical windows.
